mapper.select: SELECT ID, ASSET_NAME, TX_TYPE, BUY_PRICE, QUANTITY, COMMISSION, CURRENCY, EXCHANGE, TO_CHAR(BUY_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS BUY_DATE, MEMO FROM INVESTMENT_LOG ORDER BY BUY_DATE DESC, ID DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO INVESTMENT_LOG ( ASSET_NAME, TX_TYPE, BUY_PRICE, QUANTITY, COMMISSION, CURRENCY, EXCHANGE, BUY_DATE, MEMO ) VALUES ( #{assetName}, #{txType}, #{buyPrice}, #{quantity}, #{commission}, #{currency}, #{exchange},
TO_DATE(#{buyDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
SYSDATE
, #{memo} )
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(ID) as id, ASSET_NAME AS assetName, SUM(QUANTITY) AS totalQuantity, SUM(BUY_PRICE * QUANTITY) / SUM(QUANTITY) AS avgPrice FROM INVESTMENT_LOG GROUP BY ASSET_NAME HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN TX_TYPE = 'BUY' THEN QUANTITY ELSE -QUANTITY END) > 0
SELECT ID, ASSET_NAME, TX_TYPE, BUY_PRICE, QUANTITY, TO_CHAR(BUY_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS BUY_DATE, MEMO, COMMISSION, CURRENCY, EXCHANGE FROM INVESTMENT_LOG WHERE ID = ${id}
